case_title: SADRUDDIN HOODBHOY et al VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $180.00 FILED BY HOODBHOY, SADRUDDIN HENDERSON, ARLA J. AS TO DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOODBHOY, SADRUDDIN HENDERSON, ARLA J. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *AGENT FOR SERVICE: RANDALL G. CHAPMAN* (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED SEP-18-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-02-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT SADRUDDIN HOODBHAY. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED THROUGH MEDIATION. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RICHARD REHL-PROPERTY SUPERVISOR AND GARY NELSON--RESIDENT MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 10/22/12. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
